content.value: by Nepali enthusiasts, the team is now a strong part of Germany's football community.

content.bold: Goal: Sport, Physical activity, Recreation, Community Integration
Team formed to play a tournament in Aarau, Switzerland:

content.value: This tournament played a pivotal and trailblazing role in bringing together the idea of Nepalese football team based in Munich, paving the way for the formation of NFT Munich.
NFT Munich entered the tournament with a strong passion for football and a desire to represent the Nepalese community abroad.

content.bold: Quaterfinalist in the European Cup in the First Edition:
content.value: NFT Munich made an incredible impact, reaching the quarterfinals of the tournament in its very first edition, setting the tone for future success.

content.bold: Engagment in the diaspora sports community.

value: Champions in the First Edition of the NRNA-Cup
6-time Finalist and 4-time Champions in the NRNA tournaments.

content.value: Regular participation in the friendly matches with both Nepali teams and teams from other backgrounds.
The team consists of students from prestigious universities like LMU and TUM, as well as professionals.
Regardless of profession or background, the team shares a deep passion for football.
NFT Munich is not only about football - it's about fostering integration and well being through sports.
The team represents the Nepalese community in Munich, while also engaging with the local community.
